subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 271833016 is not a GRB
body:
A. von Kienlin (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team: 

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 271833016 at 
05:10:14.79  UT on 13 August 2009, tentatively classified as a GRB, 
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a 
Terrestrial Gamma-Ray Flash (TGF)."
